title: Reliance Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
